title: Direct link to a project in a connected board from a table
excerpt: In Monday Work Management, it would be great if there was a way to include a direct link to a project in a connected board in a table. For example, from a procurement perspective, I would like to link the successful tend…

posts.author: migracev (Matt Igracev)
posts.cookedHtml: In Monday Work Management, it would be great if there was a way to include a direct link to a project in a connected board in a table. For example, from a procurement perspective, I would like to link the successful tender project to the contracted supplier row in our contract management space
